mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS property_id, p.name, p.property_type, p.sgg_cd, p.umd_nm, ( SELECT sd.deal_amount FROM sale_deal sd WHERE sd.property_id = p.id ORDER BY sd.deal_date DESC, sd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_sale_price, ( SELECT rd.deposit FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.property_id = p.id AND rd.monthly_rent = 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_jeonse_deposit, latest_monthly_rent_deal.deposit AS latest_monthly_rent_deposit, latest_monthly_rent_deal.monthly_rent AS latest_monthly_rent, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sale_deal sd WHERE sd.property_id = p.id AND sd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) AS sale_deal_count, COALESCE(rent_deal_counts.jeonse_deal_count, 0) AS jeonse_deal_count, COALESCE(rent_deal_counts.monthly_rent_deal_count, 0) AS monthly_rent_deal_count FROM favorite_property fp JOIN property p ON p.id = fp.property_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT property_id, deposit, monthly_rent FROM ( SELECT rd.property_id, rd.deposit, rd.monthly_rent, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY rd.property_id ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC ) AS rn FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.monthly_rent > 0 ) latest_monthly_rent_ranked WHERE rn = 1 ) latest_monthly_rent_deal ON latest_monthly_rent_deal.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rd.property_id, SUM(CASE WHEN rd.monthly_rent = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS jeonse_deal_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rd.monthly_rent > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS monthly_rent_deal_count FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} GROUP BY rd.property_id ) rent_deal_counts ON rent_deal_counts.property_id = p.id WHERE fp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fp.created_at DESC, fp.id DESC
